case_title: VERONICA GOOD VS. MIKHAIL GORELIK et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOOD, VERONICA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VERONICA GOOD'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B (PROVIDING COURTESY COPIES). THE MOVING PAPERS ARE NOT SCANNED ON THE COURT'S IJS SYSTEM. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)

ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL

LAW AND MOTION 302, T. TROY OTUS'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF VERONICA GOOD IS GRANTED, EFFECTIVE UPON THE FILING OF A PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER. Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: T. TROY OTUS'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF VERONICA GOOD

Appearances: Christopher A. Barnett (415.729.5298), counsel for plaintiff and moving to be relieved; No other appearances.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: Granted, effective upon the filing of a proof of service of the order. Service is to be pursuant to CCP 1011 (B) and CRC 3.252. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF VERONICA GOOD's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS Off calendar. The moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B (providing courtesy copies). The moving papers are not scanned on the Court's IJS system. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
